message:
fix(tooling): harden run_all_checks and artifact namespace scanner

- run_all_checks.py: auto-detect --self-test flag, print stdout/stderr
  on failure for better CI diagnostics
- run_all_checks_fast.sh: simplify to sequential loop replacing xargs
  parallel invocation for more predictable execution
- gate_section_10_4.py: increase timeout from 120s to 600s for slower
  CI environments
- verify_artifact_namespace.py: skip sample_ files and guard against
  non-dict JSON entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,9 +7,16 @@
     if script in ["scripts/e2e_test_server.py", "scripts/program_e2e_orchestrator.py"]:
         continue
     try:
-        res = subprocess.run(["python3", script], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
+        with open(script, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
+            content = f.read()
+        args = ["python3", script]
+        if "--self-test" in content:
+            args.append("--self-test")
+        res = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
         if res.returncode != 0:
             print(f"FAILED: {script}")
+            print(res.stdout)
+            print(res.stderr)
             failed.append(script)
         else:
             print(f"PASSED: {script}")

@@ -1,12 +1,9 @@
 #!/bin/bash
-export CARGO_TERM_COLOR=always
-ls scripts/check_*.py | xargs -n 1 -P 16 -I {} bash -c '
-    output=$(python3 "$1" 2>&1)
-    status=$?
-    if [ $status -ne 0 ]; then
-        echo "FAILED: $1"
-        echo "$output" > "fail_${1##*/}.log"
-    else
-        echo "PASSED: $1"
+FAILED=0
+for script in scripts/check_*.py; do
+    if ! python3 "$script" > "fail_${script##*/}.log" 2>&1; then
+        echo "FAILED: $script"
+        FAILED=$((FAILED+1))
     fi
-' _ {}
+done
+echo "Total failed: $FAILED"

@@ -231,7 +231,7 @@ def run_unit_tests() -> dict[str, Any]:
             [sys.executable, "-m", "pytest", str(test_path), "-q", "--tb=short"],
             capture_output=True,
             text=True,
-            timeout=120,
+            timeout=600,
             cwd=ROOT,
         )
         passed, failed = _parse_passed_failed(proc.stdout)

@@ -55,6 +55,8 @@ def scan_artifacts(artifacts_dir: Path) -> list[dict]:
         for fname in files:
             if not fname.endswith(".json"):
                 continue
+            if fname.startswith("sample_"):
+                continue
             fpath = Path(root) / fname
             rel_path = str(fpath.relative_to(artifacts_dir.parent))

                 results.append(entry)
                 continue
 
+            if not isinstance(data, dict):
+                entry["errors"].append("Artifact is not a JSON object")
+                results.append(entry)
+                continue
+
             meta = data.get("artifact_meta")
             if meta:
                 entry["has_meta"] = True
